steps.description: Images analysis and base calling was done using solexa pipeline and reads aligned to both mouse NCBI build 36 using ELAND.
For ChIP-Seq, sequences from all lanes were extended 200bp (maximum fragment length accounting for ~100bp of primer sequence), and allocated into 25 bp bins.
Genomic bins containing statistically significant ChIP-seq enrichment were identified by comparison to a Poissonian background model, using a p-value threshold of 10-9.

Additionally, we used an empirical background model obtained from identical Solexa sequencing of DNA from whole cell extract (WCE) from matched cell samples (>5X normalized enrichment across the entire region).

raw_text: Images analysis and base calling was done using solexa pipeline and reads aligned to both mouse NCBI build 36 using ELAND.  For ChIP-Seq, sequences from all lanes were extended 200bp (maximum fragment length accounting for ~100bp of primer sequence), and allocated into 25 bp bins.  Genomic bins containing statistically significant ChIP-seq enrichment were identified by comparison to a Poissonian background model, using a p-value threshold of 10-9.  Additionally, we used an empirical background model obtained from identical Solexa sequencing of DNA from whole cell extract (WCE) from matched cell samples (>5X normalized enrichment across the entire region).
